docs.event: On 4 October, 2023, at 4:18 pm, Andrew thanked Audrey, wishing her a great week and asking her to say hi to her dogs. Audrey responded by sharing a photo of her dogs and thanked Andrew, mentioning that they are a great pack and had a fun doggy playdate. Andrew expressed his admiration for the dogs and thanked Audrey for the information about the websites that helped them find a suitable place for their dogs. Audrey appreciated Andrew's gratitude and encouraged him to find a great spot soon.

On 24 August 2023 at 12:24 am, Andrew thanked Audrey for her help and support, sharing a photo of Toby, a small dog. Andrew expressed his gratitude and mentioned that Audrey 'rocks.' On 4 November 2023 at 7:59 pm, Andrew thanked Audrey again for her help, sharing that he had managed to take care of a dog in the city. Audrey advised him to keep the dog active and shared a photo of toys and games she uses. Andrew appreciated her advice and thanked her for her support. On 4 October 2023 at 4:18 pm, Andrew thanked Audrey once more for her help, expressing that she had been very helpful.

On 27 March 2023 at 1:10 pm, Audrey thanked Andrew for suggesting Fox Hollow as a great hiking spot. Andrew mentioned that the views are awesome on weekends. Audrey appreciated the suggestion and planned to try it out. On 6 September 2023 at 7:49 pm, Andrew thanked Audrey for her advice on managing stress and finding balance, especially given the tough work situation. Audrey supported him, reminding him to take care of himself and find ways to manage stress. On 4 October 2023 at 4:18 pm, Andrew thanked Audrey again, wishing her well and asking her to say hi to her dogs. Audrey responded positively, and they ended their conversation with good wishes for each other.

On 4 November, 2023, at 7:59 pm, Andrew expressed gratitude to Audrey for her help and support. He said, 'Cool ideas! I think I'll give those activities a try with my pups. Thanks! ' Audrey responded, 'No problem, glad I could help. Let me know how it goes.' Andrew further thanked Audrey, saying, 'Your advice and support really mean a lot to me! Thank you so much!' On 4 October, 2023, at 4:18 pm, Andrew acknowledged Audrey's assistance, saying, 'Oh you've helped so much.' Audrey replied, 'Haha i'm just doing what I can do to help.' Andrew expressed his gratitude again, saying, 'Thank you really. Well, take care and say hi to your dogs for me.'

On June 13, 2023, at 5:23 pm, Audrey suggested Andrew join her and her dogs for a walk in a small park with a trail surrounded by trees. Andrew expressed interest in the idea, mentioning that he has been feeling encouraged to try more outdoor activities after rock climbing. On July 11, 2023, at 10:05 am, Andrew proposed the idea of Audrey and her dogs joining him for a hike, emphasizing the benefits of enjoying nature and having fun together. He mentioned that he has been stressed due to work and needs a break. On July 8, 2023, at 9:48 am, Audrey showed interest in joining Andrew for a hike and bringing her dogs, noting that she wants them to have a chance to run freely. Andrew agreed and shared a photo of a steep hill with a view of the ocean, suggesting a trail that would be great for the dogs. Both Andrew and Audrey expressed enthusiasm for the planned hike and the opportunity to enjoy nature with their dogs.

On multiple occasions, Audrey shared a photo of two dogs running in a field with a ball in their mouths. On 9:19 pm on 19 August, 2023, Audrey shared the photo and mentioned that she couldn't wait to see the pictures Andrew was taking. Andrew expressed his excitement and said he would show her the photos when he returned. On 9:48 am on 8 July, 2023, Audrey shared the photo and expressed how much joy the dogs bring her, noting that they make her life less boring. Andrew commented on how adorable the dogs look playing in the park. On 8:32 pm on 3 July, 2023, Audrey shared the photo and talked about how rewarding it is to see the dogs do well, emphasizing the calming and restorative effect of nature with the dogs around. Andrew inquired about the dogs' breeds and their favorite activities, to which Audrey replied that they are mutts, specifically two Jack Russell mixes and two Chihuahua mixes, and that they love running and playing fetch.

On 7:59 pm on 4 November, 2023, Audrey shared a photo of a group of people and dogs in a park and discussed her weekly meetups with other dog owners for tips and playtime. Andrew inquired about the frequency of these meetups and expressed interest in joining a similar group. Audrey shared her experience of managing four dogs, noting the challenges and the importance of giving each dog individual attention. On 9:58 pm on 16 August, 2023, Audrey shared another photo of a group of people walking with dogs in a park, mentioning that they each have their favorite spots to relax. She described how Pepper, Pixie, Precious, and Panda have their own cozy areas. On 2:36 pm on 28 October, 2023, Audrey shared a photo of a dog chasing another dog in a park, expressing her luck in having a friend like Andrew who enjoys outdoor trips with their dogs. Andrew agreed and shared a photo of a dog eating out of a bowl on the ground, further emphasizing their shared love for these outdoor adventures.

On May 3, 2023, at 5:41 pm, Audrey shared a photo of her dogs running in a field with other dogs, expressing how much her dogs love exploring new scents and being in nature, as evidenced by their wagging tails and expressions. She mentioned that safety is important and showed a photo of a dog with a leash and shoes on. Andrew asked for tips on keeping dogs safe, and Audrey shared her experience. On September 24, 2023, at 5:53 pm, Audrey shared a photograph of two dogs running in a grassy field, noting that they enjoy playing in the garden and exploring. Andrew inquired about other furry friends they play with, and Audrey confirmed that they play with the ones she has. On April 16, 2023, at 4:19 pm, Audrey shared a photograph of a dog running with three other dogs in the background, expressing excitement about seeing all the dogs together and enjoying treats. Andrew commented on how cute it was, and Audrey agreed, stating that the dogs' happy faces mean a lot to her.

On 7:09 pm on 1 October, 2023, Andrew commented on the cuteness of the dogs in a photo shared by Audrey, who had taken them in a lush green field. Andrew expressed his admiration for the dogs' appearance and asked where they were taken. Audrey shared that the dogs help her find peace and that the spot looked ideal for them to play. On 8:32 pm on 3 July, 2023, Andrew complimented the dogs in another photo, saying they looked adorable and enjoyed the doggy playdate Audrey mentioned. Audrey expressed gratitude and shared that the dogs are her universe. On 3:52 pm on 27 July, 2023, Andrew commented on a cute photo of the dogs and asked about their personalities. Audrey described the oldest dog as relaxed, the second as always ready for a game, the third as naughty but loving cuddles, and the youngest as full of life and always up for an adventure. Andrew expressed admiration for their personalities and shared a photo of a dog sitting with a tennis ball, reminiscing about his childhood pup and the joy pets bring to life.

Audrey expressed that the dogs bring a lot of happiness into her life, mentioning that they are city dogs who explore new parks and trails frequently. She emphasized that they bring her joy and that she never gets bored, sharing a photo of the dogs playing in a field. Audrey also highlighted the awesomeness of the dogs and the joy and friendship they bring to her life, expressing gratitude for their presence in her family.

On October 13, 2023, at 4:22 pm, Andrew shared that he and his girlfriend Toby had a fun night playing board games, and he asked Audrey about her recent activities. Audrey responded that she had made some cookies to thank her neighbors for their dog-friendly homes and inquired about Andrew's weekend plans. Andrew mentioned his upcoming plans to visit a cozy cafe and shared a photo of a group of people sitting at a table. On October 19, 2023, at 6:12 pm, Audrey asked Andrew about their favorite activities together, and Andrew explained that he named his new dog Buddy and shared that he and Toby hope to become buddies. Audrey complimented the name and inquired about their favorite activities. On August 16, 2023, at 9:58 pm, Audrey asked Andrew about his activities since their last conversation, mentioning that she had gotten a tattoo of her four dogs on her arm. Andrew shared that he had gone to a farm with his girlfriend to get fresh veggies and inquired if Audrey was considering getting more dogs. Audrey responded that four dogs were enough for now and shared a photo of her and her dogs at the vet.

On 5:41 pm on 3 May, 2023, Audrey shared a photo of a group of dogs sitting on top of a lush green field, expressing her fulfillment from taking care of her pets and spending time with them. She mentioned that her dogs love going on hikes and enjoy exploring new scents and being in nature, as evidenced by their wagging tails and expressions. Andrew inquired about the hikes, and Audrey confirmed that her dogs are enthusiastic about them. She also shared a photo of a dog running in a field with other dogs. On 7:09 pm on 1 October, 2023, Audrey shared the same photo of a group of dogs sitting on top of a lush green field, indicating where she took them for a walk. She noted that being in a nature environment helps her clear her mind and find peace, especially during tough times. Andrew asked where she took them, and Audrey mentioned the spot looked ideal for play. On 2:42 pm on 2 April, 2023, Audrey shared a photograph of a dog sitting in a field of flowers, explaining that they used websites with filters to find a perfect spot for their dogs. Andrew appreciated the information and planned to use those websites to find a suitable location for his own pets.

On April 2, 2023, Audrey shared a photo of her dog enjoying some lazy couch time, expressing her affection for her pets. Andrew responded positively to the photo, reminiscing about his old hiking photos and how much he misses exploring nature trails with his family's dog. This sparked Audrey's interest in hiking with her dogs, as she said, 'Taking them on hikes must be awesome! That makes me want to hike with my dogs.' On October 13, 2023, Andrew acknowledged Audrey's experience of hiking with her dogs, noting it as a fun way to bond and make memories. Audrey agreed, saying, 'Yeah, I need to go on a hike with them, it's going to be a great therapy!' Andrew then speculated that Audrey's dogs enjoy going on hikes, to which Audrey confirmed, 'My dogs go nuts when we go on hikes! They love exploring new scents and being in nature - it's their happy place. I can tell by their wagging tails and expressions how much they love it. It's so great to see them having so much fun!'

At 8:32 pm on 3 July, 2023, Audrey asked Andrew how his cooking was going. She shared a photo of a lattice-topped pie and mentioned it was her family's recipe, evoking memories of her grandmother's kitchen and the conversations they shared. Andrew responded that cooking was helping him de-stress and be creative, though he admitted he was still a beginner. Audrey shared her love for trying new recipes and using cooking as a form of escape and de-stressing. She also asked Andrew if he enjoyed cooking and inquired about his favorite recipes. Andrew mentioned he had been getting into cooking more since he couldn't hike and asked Audrey if she enjoyed cooking and if she had any favorite recipes. Audrey confirmed her love for cooking and shared her favorite recipe, Chicken Pot Pie, describing it as cozy and delicious, especially on a cold day. She offered to share the recipe with Andrew.

On November 22, 2023, at 9:02 am, Audrey expressed her gladness that her dogs are part of her life. She shared that the dogs are exploring and meeting new people, feeling loved and safe. Audrey thanked Andrew for his positive feedback and expressed her gratitude for the joy and friendship the dogs bring to her life, comparing them to a part of her family. Andrew responded positively, expressing jealousy over the fun outings Audrey and her dogs have together.

On July 8, 2023, at 9:48 am, Andrew asked Audrey how she got her dog, expressing his admiration for her dogs and sharing a photo of a dog wearing a sweater sitting in the grass. Audrey explained that she found a breeder nearby who had the dogs she wanted and noted the difficulty in finding places that allow dogs. Andrew shared a photo of a group of dogs running around a park, mentioning that he had found a few parks where he could take his dog on a leash but wished for an open area where the dogs could run and play freely. He offered to let Audrey know if he found something better.

On November 22, 2023, at 9:02 am, Andrew asked Audrey how her dogs were doing now, sharing a photo of a dog jumping through a ring in the air. Audrey expressed that her dogs were doing great, exploring, meeting new people, and feeling loved and safe. She advised Andrew to slowly introduce Scout to Toby and Buddy, noting that it takes time for the pups to get used to each other. Andrew thanked her and shared that they felt lucky to have Scout and were having many furry friends. Audrey appreciated their care for Scout and the dogs' well-being.

On August 4, 2023, at 11:05 am, Andrew complimented Audrey on how her dogs were doing, sharing a photo of a group of dogs sitting on a dirt road. Audrey shared that her dogs had come a long way, enjoying physical and mental workouts, and that she took them to the park twice a week for practice, which was a great bonding experience. Andrew expressed his admiration for their progress and shared a photo of a dirt path in the woods with rocks and trees, indicating that he was at a trail he found interesting.

On April 2, 2023, Audrey shared a photo of her dog enjoying some lazy couch time, expressing her affection for her furry companions. Andrew commented on the photo, reminiscing about his own hiking experiences with his family's dog and how much he misses those peaceful moments in nature. This sparked Audrey's interest in hiking with her dogs. On June 13, 2023, Audrey suggested a park for her dogs' walk, describing it as a small park with a trail surrounded by trees. Andrew expressed interest in joining her and her dogs for a walk, stating that being in nature with dogs sounds like a great time. On July 11, 2023, Andrew mentioned that he plans to go on a hike next month and invited Audrey and her dogs to join, emphasizing the need for a break from work. Audrey accepted the invitation, excited to hike with her dogs and thanked Andrew for the personalized tags she made for them.

On April 2, 2023, at 2:42 pm, Audrey expressed hope for Andrew to find a great apartment and a furry friend, encouraging him to look forward to the companionship they would bring. Andrew responded positively, expressing his eagerness to find them soon. Audrey further expressed excitement for Andrew and his future furry friend, looking forward to seeing where they decide to hang out. Andrew acknowledged her support and commitment to staying positive. On June 2, 2023, at 11:27 am, Audrey offered to support Andrew in finding a suitable spot for his furry friend, asking him to email his criteria so she could assist. Andrew thanked her for her help, appreciating her support in the search.

On April 2, 2023, at 2:42 pm, Audrey shared a photograph of a dog sitting in a field of flowers, explaining that they used websites with filters to find a dog-friendly spot. Audrey mentioned that Pepper, one of her dogs, had taken some time to get used to the other dog but they were now always together. Andrew expressed interest in finding a similar place and Audrey recommended the websites she used. On May 3, 2023, at 5:41 pm, Audrey shared a photo of her dogs running in a field, emphasizing how much they love exploring new scents and being in nature. She highlighted their wagging tails and joyful expressions. Andrew inquired about tips for keeping dogs safe when out and about, to which Audrey responded with her safety tips, including the use of special gear like leashes and shoes, which she found effective despite its comical appearance.

Audrey expressed how rewarding it is to see her dogs do well, mentioning that they bring her love and happiness. She shared a photo of two dogs running in a field with a ball in their mouths, indicating their joy and the happiness they bring her. Audrey also acknowledged the rewarding feeling of seeing the dogs do well and how much love and happiness they bring her, sharing another photo of the dogs having a blast last summer. She expressed gratitude and mentioned that the dogs are very special to her and she wants the best for them, noting that they are all mutts, with Pepper and Panda being Lab mixes and Precious and Pixie being Chihuahua mixes. Audrey also expressed that the dogs bring a lot of happiness, sharing that they are city dogs who love trying out new parks and trails and often go on adventures together. She shared this sentiment with Andrew, who was impressed by the fun outings with the dogs and inquired about her own pets.

On 4 October 2023, at 4:18 pm, Andrew wished Audrey a great week and asked her to take care and say hi to her dogs. Audrey responded with a laugh and agreed, wishing Andrew the same. Andrew confirmed and added, 'Have a great week.'
On 11 May 2023, at 2:03 pm, Andrew wished Audrey to have fun and said he would look into their classes, then bid her goodbye with 'talk later!' Audrey acknowledged and said, 'Yup, ttyl!'

On 2 April 2023, at 2:42 pm, Audrey wished Andrew all the best as he looked for a dog-friendly spot to make new memories. Andrew expressed his excitement and gratitude, saying, 'Thanks! I'll keep looking until I find it. Super excited for what's next!' Audrey responded, 'So excited for you! I can't wait to see where you and your furry friend decide to hang out. All the best!'

On August 4, 2023, at 11:05 am, Andrew thanked Audrey for advice on taking care of Toby, his puppy. He assured Audrey that he would not limit Toby's growth but also make sure to provide him with enough attention. Audrey encouraged him, emphasizing the importance of being prepared and giving Toby the love he deserves. Andrew then said goodbye and mentioned he would take Toby for a small hike at the local trail, adding that he would talk later (ttyl). Audrey reciprocated, wishing Andrew a good day and saying goodbye. On May 6, 2023, at 10:47 am, Andrew said he couldn't wait and would ttyl, as he needed to check out another shelter soon. Audrey responded by wishing him fun and saying goodbye. On October 4, 2023, at 4:18 pm, Andrew said he had a great week, to which Audrey responded with the same, and they both said goodbye.

On 19 August 2023, Audrey offered to share some tips with Andrew regarding dog grooming. Andrew expressed interest in learning more, and Audrey agreed to provide some advice. On 6 September 2023, Andrew thanked Audrey for her advice, mentioning that he had been struggling with work and finding balance. Audrey acknowledged his difficulties and suggested taking care of himself and managing stress. Andrew appreciated her support and advice.

On May 3, 2023, at 5:41 pm, Audrey shared a photograph of a dog catching a frisbee in a field. She mentioned that they usually play fetch with a ball or frisbee and often meet other dog owners in the park for doggie playdates. Audrey expressed her happiness about the dogs and shared a photo of a dog wearing a party hat sitting on a couch. Andrew commented on the fun and excitement the dogs showed during the playdate. On November 4, 2023, at 7:59 pm, Audrey shared a photograph of a dog playing with a frisbee in a room, discussing various activities to keep the dogs mentally stimulated, such as puzzles, training, and hide-and-seek. Andrew appreciated her ideas and planned to try them with his own dogs. On June 13, 2023, at 5:23 pm, Audrey expressed her happiness about the dogs and shared a photo of two dogs playing with a frisbee in a field, noting how content they looked in the meadow. Andrew commented on the cuteness and how nature brought joy to the dogs.

On 24 October, 2023 at 10:14 am, Audrey thanked Andrew and wished him a good day in return. Andrew responded by saying, 'Haha, I'll make sure to take some photos and show you my sushi adventure.' Audrey then said, 'Enjoy! Now I'm gonna order some sushi for tonight. Thanks!' Andrew reciprocated her gratitude by saying, 'Haha! You're welcome! Have a good one!' On 27 March, 2023 at 1:10 pm, Audrey thanked Andrew again and said, 'Thanks! I'll let you know. Have a good one!' Andrew responded with, 'Take care and have a good one! See ya!'

On August 24, 2023, at 12:24 am, Andrew expressed admiration for Audrey's bond with her pets, hoping to have a similar bond with his dog Toby. He shared a photo of a dog sleeping in a dog bed on the floor. Audrey responded by saying that her dogs mean the world to her and that she hopes Andrew and Toby can have a strong bond. Andrew echoed her sentiment, expressing his eagerness to bond better with Toby. On September 24, 2023, at 5:53 pm, Andrew asked Audrey for advice on creating a strong relationship with Toby, drawing from her experience with calming her lost dog Precious. Audrey shared her method of petting, hugging, speaking calmly, and slowly walking the dog to relax, noting that such moments strengthen their bond. Andrew expressed his desire to have a similar connection with Toby and asked for advice on building a strong relationship with dogs, sharing a photo of a dog running in a field with a frisbee.

On October 7, 2023, at 7:09 pm, Audrey expressed excitement about a hike with her dogs next month, mentioning that she can't wait for the event and that her dogs always put a smile on her face. Andrew shared a photo of a sunset over the ocean with waves and mentioned a beach trip, to which Audrey responded positively, expressing her anticipation for their upcoming hike with the dogs. Andrew agreed, noting that it had been a long time since they had all been in nature together. On October 19, 2023, at 6:12 pm, Audrey further expressed her excitement about the hike, saying it was going to be awesome and that she can't wait for the event. Andrew confirmed he would be taking both of them to the trails together soon. On October 28, 2023, at 2:36 pm, Audrey shared a photo of a happy dog and expressed her excitement about seeing her dogs being happy and hiking, with Andrew agreeing that it was going to be an epic and fun hike.

Audrey expressed excitement about a beautiful spot she discovered, planning to take her dogs for a stroll there. She shared a photo of a red truck driving down a road in a field and hoped to find something just as nice for their hike. Andrew mentioned that the spot was far from the city and suggested a getaway, but Audrey was enthusiastic about finding a similar peaceful location for their dogs. Audrey and Andrew also discussed the benefits of hiking with dogs, finding it a great way to bond and create memories together. Audrey shared her excitement about exploring the trail and spending time with their pets, mentioning a lake near the trail and sharing a photo of a lake with a boat in it and a forest in the background. She expressed her anticipation for a peaceful day with her dogs.

On 27 March 2023, Andrew expressed his love for animals to Audrey, who responded positively. Audrey shared her appreciation for the happiness animals bring and asked Andrew if he had any pets. Andrew confirmed he did not have any pets but expressed his love for animals. On 11 May 2023, Audrey informed Andrew about signing up for a workshop to bond with her pets, which she found exciting. Andrew expressed happiness for Audrey's opportunity to bond with her pets and showed interest in the workshop, asking where she heard about it and commenting on a photograph of a group of dogs. Audrey agreed with Andrew, emphasizing the happiness derived from seeing her pets together, noting how they cuddle and sleep together, and expressing that it makes her very happy to see them as best friends.

On 27 July 2023 at 3:52 pm, Andrew complimented Audrey on a photograph of her dogs, describing it as cute and noting that their happy faces mean a lot to her. Audrey expressed her love for her dogs, stating that they bring so much joy to her life and that she can't imagine life without them. Andrew then asked Audrey to describe the personalities of her pets. On 24 September 2023 at 5:53 pm, Andrew complimented Audrey on a picture of her children snuggled up and having fun together, noting how cute it was and how they bring joy to their lives. Audrey responded that they bring loads of love and happiness and are everything to her. On 16 April 2023 at 4:19 pm, Andrew shared a photo of a dog running with three other dogs in the background and commented on how cute it was, expressing that the dogs' happy faces mean a lot to Audrey.

On 7:09 pm on 1 October, 2023, Andrew inquired about the location where Audrey took the dogs, noting it looks ideal for play. Audrey shared a photo of a group of dogs sitting on top of a lush green field and mentioned that taking the dogs for a walk in the park helps her clear her mind and find peace. Andrew expressed his interest in the location and asked, 'Where did you take them?' Audrey responded, 'I took them to a park with a doggy play area in the backyard.' On 1:51 pm on 26 June, 2023, Audrey asked Andrew where he is located, expressing interest in taking the dogs there sometime soon. Andrew shared a photo of a group of dogs playing with a ball in a large indoor area and said, 'That looks fun! Where are you at? I would love to take the dogs there sometime soon.' On 9:48 am on 8 July, 2023, Andrew asked Audrey how she got her dogs. Audrey shared a photo of a dog wearing a sweater sitting in the grass and said, 'We had a great walk the other day - felt really good!' Andrew responded, 'That's awesome! Dogs really make life more fun doesn't it. I wish I could get one, but like I said, it's tough to find a place and find the right dog. How did you get yours?'

Audrey shared a photo of two dogs laying on a couch with a blanket, mentioning they had a doggy playdate last Friday which was a bit crazy but still lots of fun. She described the dogs as Jack Russell and Chihuahua mixes, all 3 years old, and noted that they are a great pack. Audrey shared another photo of the dogs snuggling on her favorite blanket, which was on a couch, emphasizing their cozy nature. Andrew commented on the dogs' comfort and shared a photo of his own dog, Toby, at his favorite spot. Audrey further described how each dog has its own favorite spot to chill, with Pepper on the couch, Pixie in her bed, Precious in her chair, and Panda on his rug. She then shared a photo of the dogs snuggling on her favorite blanket, noting that they always sleep like that and are best friends.

On June 2, 2023, at 11:27 am, Audrey encouraged Andrew to keep looking for a suitable place for him and his new pet, assuring him that he would find the perfect place for both of them. Andrew expressed his determination, saying, 'Thanks! I won't give up.' Audrey offered to support Andrew in finding a great spot for his furry friend, asking him to email his criteria so she could assist. Andrew thanked her for her help, saying, 'Thanks! Your assistance is greatly appreciated. So thankful for your help.' Audrey responded, 'Not a problem at all! We'll keep searching. Stay positive!' On September 6, 2023, at 7:49 pm, Andrew mentioned that he was still working on finding a suitable place, stating, 'Nah, still working on that. It's been a bit challenging.' Audrey encouraged him to keep going, saying, 'Keep going, you'll find a great place to live for your pet soon!' Andrew appreciated her help, saying, 'Thanks! I appreciate the help. I'll keep searching for that perfect place for dogs!'

On August 24, 2023, at 12:24 am, Andrew complimented Audrey on her care of her dogs, specifically praising her methods for keeping them looking good in the mountain life. Audrey explained that regular grooming, including daily brushing, regular baths, and nail trims, was essential for their health and happiness. Andrew acknowledged her efforts, emphasizing the importance of maintaining the dogs' health and happiness. On November 4, 2023, at 7:59 pm, Andrew thanked Audrey for her methods to keep the dogs active in the city, sharing a photo of a basket full of stuffed animals on a wooden floor that Audrey used to entertain the dogs. Andrew was impressed by her approach and thanked her for her efforts. On October 28, 2023, at 2:36 pm, Audrey expressed gratitude for Andrew's encouragement, stating that his words meant a lot to her as she worked hard to keep her dogs healthy and happy. Andrew commended her for her dedication, and Audrey shared a photo of her dogs having a blast in a field, emphasizing her devotion to their well-being.

On November 22, 2023, at 9:02 am, Audrey expressed gratitude for the joy and friendship brought by their dogs, considering them a part of her family. She shared, 'Thanks! They're really awesome and bring so much joy and friendship. I'm so grateful to have them in my life as a part of my family.' Andrew agreed, saying, 'Yeah, it's great! Dogs are always there for us. We should count ourselves lucky to have such amazing furry friends as family members.'On October 28, 2023, at 2:36 pm, Audrey expressed gratitude and mentioned that the dogs are very special to her, and she wants the best for them. She shared a photo of two dogs running in a field with a ball in their mouths, saying, 'Thanks! They're really special to me and I want the best for them. Here's a pic of them having a blast last summer, so happy! I'm looking forward to the day they are back to normal.' Andrew responded, 'Aww, they're having such a blast! What kind are they? I'm wishing you and your pups the best.' Audrey added, 'Thanks! They're all mutts, but Pepper and Panda are Lab mixes, and Precious and Pixie are Chihuahua mixes. I really need that. I can't wait the day they're all back to normal.'On November 22, 2023, at 9:02 am, Audrey expressed gratitude for seeing the dogs happy and settled in new places, implying she is responsible for their well-being. She said, 'Thanks! It means a lot to see them happy and settled in new places. I guess I'm doing a good job as a doggy mom then, haha! Have you taken your furry friends to the groomers yet?' Andrew replied, 'No, we haven't got the chance to take them to the groomer yet. But will do that soon! So guess what, I can't help myself but to adopt another dog the other day. Here's a photo of the doggo!' and shared a photo of a woman feeding a dog hay in a barn. Audrey asked, 'That's great news! What's the pup's name?'

On October 28, 2023, at 2:36 pm, Audrey expressed excitement about capturing amazing moments with their furry friends, specifically mentioning the autumn colors as a great backdrop for photos. Audrey and Andrew discussed their anticipation for making memorable experiences with their pets, with Andrew sharing a photograph of a man and his dog on a hiking trail, highlighting the dog's happy face. Audrey was thrilled at the prospect of seeing her own pets happy and engaged in outdoor activities. Audrey also shared her admiration for animals, discussing the amazing qualities of birds, particularly their ability to soar and explore new places, and expressed interest in Andrew's favorite type of bird.

On 10:47 am on 6 May, 2023, Andrew expressed appreciation to Audrey, saying, 'Thanks! I'll let you know how it goes.' Audrey responded by offering to keep him posted and suggesting she could provide any suggestions or help if needed. Andrew acknowledged her offer with, 'Will do! Really appreciate it.' On 9:02 am on 22 November, 2023, Audrey thanked Andrew for his positive sentiment, sharing that the dogs are doing great and feeling loved and safe, and expressing gratitude for their presence in her life. Andrew responded positively, stating, 'That's great to hear! Dogs truly bring so much joy and friendship. I'm glad they're happy with you.' On 8:32 pm on 3 July, 2023, Audrey thanked Andrew, mentioning that the dogs are a great pack and sharing a photo of two dogs laying on a couch with a blanket. Andrew complimented them, saying, 'They look adorable! Doggy playdates sound like a lot of fun. Glad they all get along.' Audrey expressed her gratitude, saying, 'Thanks! They really are my universe. So anything new you've been into lately?'

On 26 June, 2023 at 1:51 pm, Audrey expressed gratitude for a received offer, mentioning appreciation for friends who understand their love for their pets. She said, 'Thanks! Appreciate the offer. Super nice to have friends who understand our love for our pets!' Andrew responded, 'Haha yeah! People who understand the love for dogs are awesome. They really bring so much joy!' Audrey added, 'Right!? Animals are great! They really bring so much joy. Can't imagine life without them!' On 22 November, 2023 at 9:02 am, Audrey expressed gratitude for the joy and friendship brought by their dogs, considering them a part of their family. She said, 'Thanks! They're really awesome and bring so much joy and friendship. I'm so grateful to have them in my life as a part of my family.' Andrew agreed, 'Yeah, it's great! Dogs are always there for us. We should count ourselves lucky to have such amazing furry friends as family members.' On 4 August, 2023 at 11:05 am, Audrey appreciated the human-animal bond, mentioning the joy and love her pets bring her and that she is blessed to have them. She said, 'Yeah, humans and animals have a cool connection. They bring us so much joy and love. I'm blessed to have my furry friends in my life. They're my companions and always make my day better.'
